message:
test(oracle): add 5 conformance tests for UPDATE SET, multi-JOIN NULLs, string funcs, WHERE, ORDER BY

New oracle probes:
- UPDATE with CASE expressions, arithmetic, and subqueries in WHERE
- Multi-way LEFT/INNER JOIN with NULL propagation and COUNT
- Extended string functions: instr, replace, hex, quote, unicode, char, zeroblob
- Complex WHERE: nested AND/OR, BETWEEN, IN subquery, NULL comparisons
- ORDER BY edge cases: expressions, mixed directions, NULL ordering, LIMIT/OFFSET

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
